text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: One, two, one, two! Yeah, that was good!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Thanks for giving me a break. I had a
good rest.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Thanks for giving me a break. I had a
good rest.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I've got a full tank and my engine is
revving!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So c'mon, let's put the pedal to the metal and go,
go, GO! ♪
